sourceAmbiguity: The source requires menu path persistence but does not specify whether repeated IVR selections overwrite earlier choices.
decisionTaken: Repeated menu inputs append MenuSelectionCapture records. The current projection derives from the latest non-duplicate capture, and corrections carry correctionOfCaptureRef where a prior capture exists.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Append-only menu history preserves auditability and replay safety while still giving support and later workers a current menu path.
operationalRisk: Downstream workers that read only the latest projection may miss correction history unless they also cite menuCaptureRefs.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: If clinical policy requires operator review for certain corrections, add a parsePosture or review reason without rewriting prior captures.
